siteTitle: 茶井奶蓋專門店 Tea Well - Cheung Sha Wan Bubble Tea
siteDescription: Tea Well in Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong — award-winning cheese milk foam tea, brown sugar boba, fruit tea, and more. Unlimited cheese foam refills. Visit us at 498 Un Chau Street.
announcementText: 🥇 Signature Cheese Milk Foam — unlimited refills! $1 plain tea available.
heroTagline: Hong Kong's Finest Cheese Milk Foam Tea
heroText: Handcrafted bubble teas, cheese milk foam drinks, and fresh fruit teas made daily in Cheung Sha Wan. Our signature 王牌芝士奶蓋 comes with unlimited refills.
aboutText1: Located in the heart of Cheung Sha Wan, 茶井奶蓋專門店 Tea Well is your go-to destination for premium cheese milk foam tea. We specialize in 王牌芝士奶蓋 — our award-winning cheese milk foam that you can refill unlimited times.
aboutText2: From classic pearl milk tea to refreshing fruit teas, every drink is made fresh to order with quality ingredients. Come taste the difference that made us Cheung Sha Wan's favorite bubble tea spot.
aboutAddress: Shop F2, G/F, Ching Wah Court, 498 Un Chau Street, Cheung Sha Wan, Kowloon
menuCat1Sub: Signature cheese milk foam — unlimited refills 🥇

promo1Title: 王牌芝士奶蓋 Cheese Milk Foam
promo1Text: Any cheese milk foam drink comes with unlimited cheese foam refills. Yes, unlimited!
promo2Text: Get any plain pure tea for just $1. Limited time offer.
promo3Text: Medium milk foam tea + croissant waffle — perfect pairing!
reviewsSource: Reviews sourced from OpenRice Hong Kong
testimonial1: "The cheese milk foam is out of this world! Unlimited refills is a game changer. My go-to spot in Cheung Sha Wan."
testimonial2: "Best brown sugar boba milk tea I've had in Kowloon. The pearls are perfectly chewy every time."
testimonial3: "Love the fruit tea Four Seasons Spring — so refreshing on a hot day. Great service too!"
